understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate tile grid to land exactly on the `+` goal gem while avoiding spikes; complete levels with limited attempts and turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT causes automatic fall in current gravity (DOWN toward y=0 or UP toward higher y) until solid landing; CLICK removes `x` breakables at target; spikes `u/v` end run immediately; UNDO reverts last action; corridor_scan shows passage columns to change y-levels.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate tile grid to land exactly on the `+` goal gem while avoiding spikes; complete levels with limited attempts and turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT causes automatic fall in current gravity (DOWN toward y=0 or UP toward higher y) until solid landing; CLICK removes `x` breakables at target; spikes `u/v` end run immediately; UNDO reverts last action; corridor_scan shows passage columns to change y-levels.
